question:

Please create a deployment readiness checklist for the new features, Markdown format, save to day24/. Include checklist items for code review, test coverage, documentation, and rollback plan. Add YAML frontmatter.

content.text:
[Wed 2026-03-18 15:03 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Correct!

Please create a deployment readiness checklist for the new features, Markdown format, save to day24/. Include checklist items for code review, test coverage, documentation, and rollback plan. Add YAML frontmatter.

arguments.content:
---
created_at: "2026-04-16T14:00:00+08:00"
author: "Alex Zhang"
status: "active"
version: "1.0.0"
description: "Deployment readiness checklist for new dashboard and export features"
---

# Deployment Readiness Checklist

This checklist ensures all requirements are met before deploying new features to production.

---

## Code Review

| # | Item | Status | Notes |
|---|------|--------|-------|
| 1 | All code reviewed by at least one senior engineer | ❌ Pending | |
| 2 | No high-severity security issues in code scan | ❌ Pending | |
| 3 | Linting and formatting checks pass | ❌ Pending | |
| 4 | Type checking passes (mypy/pyright) | ❌ Pending | |
| 5 | No hardcoded secrets or credentials | ❌ Pending | |
| 6 | API changes are backward compatible | ❌ Pending | |

---

## Test Coverage

| # | Item | Status | Notes |
|---|------|--------|-------|
| 1 | Unit test coverage > 80% for new code | ❌ Pending | |
| 2 | Integration tests pass for /projects and /tasks endpoints | ❌ Pending | |
| 3 | End-to-end tests pass for critical user journeys | ❌ Pending | |
| 4 | Performance tests pass (p95 < 200ms) | ❌ Pending | |
| 5 | Load tests pass at 2x expected traffic | ❌ Pending | |
| 6 | Security tests pass (OWASP Top 10) | ❌ Pending | |

---

## Documentation

| # | Item | Status | Notes |
|---|------|--------|-------|
| 1 | API documentation updated (OpenAPI/Swagger) | ❌ Pending | |
| 2 | README updated with new feature instructions | ❌ Pending | |
| 3 | Deployment runbook updated | ❌ Pending | |
| 4 | On-call playbook updated | ❌ Pending | |
| 5 | Change log updated | ❌ Pending | |
| 6 | User-facing documentation reviewed | ❌ Pending | |

---

## Rollback Plan

### Pre-Deployment

| # | Item | Status | Notes |
|---|------|--------|-------|
| 1 | Database backup completed and verified | ❌ Pending | |
| 2 | Previous release artifacts tagged | ❌ Pending | |
| 3 | Feature flags configured for gradual rollout | ❌ Pending | |
| 4 | Monitoring dashboards verified | ❌ Pending | |
| 5 | Alerting rules tested | ❌ Pending | |

### Rollback Procedure

1. **Immediate Rollback** (< 5 minutes)
   - Run: `./scripts/rollback.sh --version PREVIOUS_TAG`
   - Verify health checks pass
   - Update load balancer if needed

2. **Database Rollback** (if schema changes)
   - Execute rollback migrations: `./scripts/db-rollback.sh`
   - Verify data consistency

3. **Communication**
   - Notify #incidents channel
   - Post status page update
   - Schedule post-mortem meeting

### Rollback Triggers

| Condition | Action |
|-----------|--------|
| Error rate > 1% | Immediate rollback |
| P95 latency > 500ms | Evaluate rollback |
| Critical user journey fails | Immediate rollback |
| Database connection pool exhausted | Immediate rollback |

---

## Sign-off

| Role | Name | Signature | Date |
|------|------|-----------|------|
| Tech Lead | Alex Zhang | ___________ | _______ |
| QA Lead | Dana | ___________ | _______ |
| Product Manager | ____ | ___________ | _______ |
| DevOps | ____ | ___________ | _______ |

---

*Last updated: 2026-04-16*
